timeline.detail: State frozen at t=126s. COA W2-A applied. SAM batteries activating engagement tracks. ftr-n3/n4 scrambling for trk-h07.
Firewatch SAM locks trk-h05 (cruise-type, heading to Arktholm). Firing 2 missiles.
trk-h05 intercepted by Firewatch SAM. Kill confirmed. Missiles remaining: 10.
ftr-n3 and ftr-n4 airborne from Base North. Heading to intercept trk-h07.
Firewatch SAM locks trk-h04 (cruise-type, heading to Valbrek). At edge of coverage. Firing 2 missiles.
trk-h04 intercepted by Firewatch SAM. Kill confirmed. Very low altitude engagement was marginal. Missiles remaining: 8.
Eastern Ridge SAM locks trk-h06 (UAV swarm). Firing 2 missiles at lead elements.
trk-h06 partially degraded. 2 of estimated 4-6 UAVs destroyed. Swarm continues at reduced effectiveness. Missiles remaining: 6.
ftr-n3 achieves weapons lock on trk-h07 at (280, 480). High-altitude engagement. Firing.
trk-h07 intercepted. Kill confirmed. ftr-n3 expends 2 air-to-air missiles.
uav-h1 confirms trk-h08 is electronic decoy. No kinetic threat. Reclassified.
trk-h06 (degraded UAV swarm) continues toward Nordvik. Eastern SAM preparing second salvo.
Eastern Ridge SAM fires 2 more missiles at trk-h06 remnants.
trk-h06 swarm neutralized. Remaining UAVs destroyed or scattered. Missiles remaining: 4.
ftr-n3, ftr-n4 returning to Base North. ETA 10 min. Recovery and rearm: 25 min.
trk-h03 (original UAV, wave 1) still tracking slowly. No engagement. trk-h08 confirmed decoy, disregarded.
Wave 2 threats neutralized. 4 high-value tracks intercepted (trk-h04, h05, h06, h07). trk-h03 still monitored. trk-h08 was decoy. No zone breaches. Strategic reserve (Spear Point QRA) intact.

base-south.notes: Can activate now to rebuild reserve

base-spear.notes: STRATEGIC RESERVE INTACT — key outcome of this plan

narration: The layered defence plan held. SAM batteries proved effective against the cruise missile threats — Firewatch intercepted both trk-h05 and trk-h04 before they reached their target zones. The Northern Vanguard fighter pair took down the high-altitude fighter trk-h07 on the central axis. Eastern Ridge SAM neutralized the UAV swarm in two salvos. The forward UAV confirmed trk-h08 was a decoy. Most importantly, the Spear Point QRA pair was never committed — our strategic reserve is intact. Total readiness is at 52%, with wave-1 fighters beginning to come back online in about 5 minutes. The main concern going forward: SAM ammunition is depleted by about a third, and if a sustained campaign continues, we'll need to consider resupply or redistribution.
